serviceDescription: A map service on the www depicting the status of areas showing National Forest System land parcels that have management or use limits placed on them by legal authority. Examples are: National Recreation Area, National Monument, and National Game Refuge. This map service provides display, identification, and analysis tools for determining current boundary information for Forest Service managers, GIS Specialists, and others. The map service uses a File Geodatabase data source with Web Mercator projection. Metadata
